title: Doctrine Supply Chain Training Mode
objective: Transformer le lab supply chain en outil pedagogique vendable.

scenarios.title: GitLab supply chain
scenarios.objective: Comprendre la chaine repo -> pipeline -> runner -> image -> registry -> preuve DREPS.

scenarios.title: Kubernetes foundations
scenarios.objective: Relier namespace, workload, pod, service et NetworkPolicy dans un evidence-pack pedagogique.

scenarios.title: Registry trust
scenarios.objective: Comprendre certificat registry, chaine de confiance, signature d'image et preuve verifiable.

scenarios.title: Git forensic
scenarios.objective: Auditer historique Git, tags, CODEOWNERS, signatures et risques de provenance.

scenarios.title: DORA NIS2 SLSA mapping
scenarios.objective: Transformer un finding technique en impact conformite explicite et actionnable.

scenarios.title: GitOps remediation
scenarios.objective: Passer d'un finding a une remediation versionnee, verifiable et rollbackable.

scenarios.title: Audit-pack exploration
scenarios.objective: Apprendre a inspecter findings, compliance, blast radius et checksums sans lancer l'UI.
